subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-05-06 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: Those people, filled as they are with pride and ignorance, deemed themselves to be worthy or deserving, oblivious of the fact
subcodes.first_line_orig: آن نفوس پر غفلت و غرور گمان مینمودند که خود لیاقت و استحقاقی دارند غافل از اینکه
subcodes.subjects: @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge
